title: CNN Premieres 'Kara Swisher Wants to Live Forever' -- Six-Part Longevity Docuseries Debuts Tonight
description: CNN's new six-part series follows journalist Kara Swisher investigating longevity science, featuring Sam Altman, Bryan Johnson, Jennifer Doudna, and Scott Galloway. Premiering April 11 at 9pm ET, the show covers everything from concierge clinics and biotech labs to South Korea's preventive care system, bringing longevity mainstream for millions of viewers.

title: NMN Plus Apigenin Combination Restores Muscle, Bone, and Gut Health in Aged Mice via SIRT3 Pathway
description: A new study published in Aging Cell shows that combining NMN (NAD+ precursor) with apigenin (CD38 inhibitor) restores muscle function, bone structure, and gut microbiome diversity in aged mice via SIRT3 activation. The 'increase supply while reducing consumption' approach outperformed either compound alone and could reframe practical NAD+ supplementation strategies.

title: Somatostatin Repurposing: Brain Neuropeptide Converts Microglia to 'Protective Mode,' Clears Amyloid in Alzheimer's Mice
description: DGIST researchers demonstrated that elevating somatostatin in Alzheimer's model mice suppressed neuroinflammation, substantially reduced amyloid beta accumulation, and improved long-term spatial memory. Since somatostatin receptors are already FDA-approved drug targets for other conditions, this opens a fast-track drug repurposing pathway for dementia treatment.

title: BMJ Open Study Challenges US Longevity Disparity Narrative: All States Show Gains from 1941-2000
description: A University of Wisconsin-Madison study in BMJ Open finds universal cohort life expectancy gains across all US states from 1941 to 2000, ranging from 7 to 16 years. This challenges the Yale-led narrative of radical state divergence, finding instead a two-phase pattern of mid-century convergence followed by stalling -- but no declines, even in the South.

title: A4M Longevity SpringFest 2026 Convenes in West Palm Beach: Exosomes, GLP-1, and Regenerative Medicine Take Center Stage
description: The A4M Longevity SpringFest 2026 (April 9-12, West Palm Beach) brings together leading longevity clinicians for a full-day Exosomes Masterclass, sessions on GLP-1/mTOR mastery, and keynote by Dr. Michael Roizen asking 'Can You Be 40 When the Calendar Says 90?' The event signals the growing clinical translation of longevity science into practice.

title: CNN Docuseries 'Kara Swisher Wants to Live Forever' Premieres April 11
description: Six-part CNN Original Series follows Kara Swisher investigating longevity science, featuring interviews with Sam Altman, Bryan Johnson, Jennifer Doudna, and visits to biotech labs and South Korea's healthcare system.

title: NMN Plus Apigenin Restores Muscle, Bone, and Gut in Aged Mice
description: Combining NMN with apigenin restored NAD+ levels, reduced senescence markers, improved muscle strength, bone density, and gut microbiome diversity in aged mice. Benefits were partially SIRT3-dependent.

title: Somatostatin Converts Brain Immune Cells to Protective Mode, Alleviates Alzheimer's Pathology
description: DGIST researchers found somatostatin directly regulates microglia to suppress neuroinflammation, reduce amyloid beta, and improve spatial memory in Alzheimer's mice, opening drug repurposing possibilities.

title: New BMJ Open Study: All US States Show Longevity Gains from 1941-2000
description: University of Wisconsin-Madison researchers challenge earlier Yale estimates, finding universal cohort life expectancy gains of 7-16 years across all US states, with less disparity than previously believed.

title: A4M Longevity SpringFest 2026: Exosomes Masterclass and Regenerative Medicine Focus
description: The A4M Longevity SpringFest 2026 (April 9-12, West Palm Beach) features an Exosomes Masterclass, GLP-1 mastery sessions, and keynote by Dr. Michael Roizen on reversing biological age.

title: Novel RNA Therapy Encourages Heart Self-Repair via Atrial Natriuretic Peptide
description: RNA-lipid nanoparticles encoding Nppa in skeletal muscle produce pro-ANP converted to ANP by Corin in the heart, reducing scarring and improving cardiac function in animal models with a single injection.

title: High-Dose Influenza Vaccine Linked to Lower Alzheimer's Risk in Adults Over 65
description: Retrospective study of 120,775 adults aged 65+ found high-dose influenza vaccination associated with lower Alzheimer's dementia risk in the first 25 months compared to standard-dose.

title: PANoptosis in Cardiac Aging: Targeting Multi-Modal Cell Death Offers Preclinical Promise
source: Fight Aging! / Frontiers in Cardiovascular Medicine
description: PANoptosis integrating pyroptosis, apoptosis, and necroptosis via the PANoptosome complex offers a new preclinical target to delay cardiac aging through gene editing strategies.

title: AhR Inhibition Promotes Axon Regeneration After Spinal Cord Injury (Published in Nature)
description: Published in Nature, aryl hydrocarbon receptor inhibition promotes axon regrowth in peripheral and spinal cord injury models via HIF1a, shifting cells from stress signaling to growth signaling.

title: Acoramidis Shows Durable 54-Month Efficacy in Transthyretin Amyloid Cardiomyopathy
description: Open-label extension of the ATTRibute-CM trial shows continuous acoramidis treatment through 54 months reduced all-cause mortality by 45% and cardiovascular mortality by 49% in ATTR-CM patients.

title: Eli Lilly Signs $2.75B Deal with Insilico Medicine for AI-Developed Oral Therapeutics
description: Eli Lilly expanded its AI drug development partnership with Insilico Medicine in a deal worth up to $2.75 billion, with $115 million upfront, for exclusive worldwide licensing of preclinical oral therapeutics.

title: Nature Feature: Partial Cellular Reprogramming About to Be Tested in Humans
description: Nature published an in-depth feature on Life Biosciences' ER-100, the first partial epigenetic reprogramming therapy entering human trials for glaucoma and NAION using three Yamanaka factors.

title: Life Biosciences' FDA-Cleared Trial: Is the FDA Warming to Rejuvenation?
description: Lifespan.io analyzes Life Biosciences' ER-100 trial and what FDA clearance means for the broader rejuvenation field, noting it could build regulatory trust in cellular reprogramming.

title: Rubedo Life Sciences Phase 1 RLS-1496: First GPX4 Modulator Shows Senolytic Efficacy in Humans
description: Rubedo's first-in-class GPX4 modulator RLS-1496 met its primary endpoint in Phase 1, with dose-dependent senescent cell reduction and improvement in psoriasis, atopic dermatitis, and skin aging.

title: UT Health San Antonio Launches Multi-Phase Rapamycin, Semaglutide, and Dapagliflozin Trial
description: NIA-funded study will test rapamycin, semaglutide, and dapagliflozin in over 700 older adults to determine optimal dosing and whether these drugs slow biological aging.

title: Targeting Longevity 2026 Congress: Aging Reframed as Loss of Biological Coordination
description: The 2nd World Congress on Targeting Longevity in Berlin brought together researchers in mitochondria, microbiota, and senescence to reframe aging as a systems coordination problem.

title: The Senolytics Pipeline in 2026: Three Lanes of Development
description: Comprehensive analysis finds the senolytics field splitting into academic D+Q combinations, localized precision therapies, and next-gen discovery including GPX4 modulation and immune-mediated clearance.

title: Longevity Biotech Investment Q1 2026: $3.74B Raised Across 49 Deals
description: Q1 2026 saw 49 financing events raising $3.74 billion, a 56% increase over Q1 2025, with a projected full-year range of $8-9 billion in longevity biotech investment.

title: Longevity Funding Tracker: 12 Pure-Play Deals Raise $530M+ Since Late 2025
description: Twelve longevity pure-players disclosed new funding led by Function Health's $298M Series B at $2.5B valuation, with deals spanning reprogramming, mTOR inhibitors, and diagnostics.

title: Bryan Johnson's Blueprint Protocol 2026 Update: Refined Diet, Rapamycin Dropped
description: Blueprint 2026 refines macros to 2,250 cal with 130g protein, eliminates rapamycin due to side effects, and emphasizes measurement-first supplement decisions based on lab results.

title: USA Today: Kara Swisher, Tech Bros Skewered in CNN Longevity Docuseries
description: USA Today covers the CNN series examining the longevity industry, noting Swisher's sharp reporting on the hype versus science divide, including critical examination of Bryan Johnson's methods.

title: MBC BioLabs Longevity Innovation Forum: 9 Startups Including Cavalry, Arda, Deciduous
description: MBC BioLabs hosted its Longevity Innovation Forum on April 2 featuring 9 startups spanning pathogenic cell targeting, genome protection, and novel therapeutics, with investors from a16z Bio, Lilly Ventures, and age1.

title: Alex Zhavoronkov: Longevity Biotech Crossing from 'Interesting Thesis' to Mainstream
description: Insilico Medicine's Alex Zhavoronkov declares 2026 the breakout year for longevity biotech, with real translational science, clearer clinical pathways, and investors treating aging biology seriously.

title: David Sinclair Announces Lifespan Magazine Launching April 2026
description: David Sinclair promotes the launch of Lifespan Magazine, promising evidence-based longevity insights and actionable advice without hype, debuting in April 2026.

title: Rapamycin for Longevity: Comprehensive Frontiers Review of Pros, Cons, and Future Perspectives
description: Extensive review covering the PEARL trial and rapamycin's dose-dependent effects finds that human data still lack proof of slowed biological aging despite strong preclinical evidence.
